name: Kolache Slovakian Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumple the yeast into a bowl.
2. Add the scalded milk cooled to 80F.
3. Add sugar and salt, stirring to dissolve.
4. Beat eggs well and add them.
5. Sift flour once before measuring; spoon it lightly into the cup.
6. Add mace and lemon rind to the flour.
7. Mix in all the flour with the liquid thoroughly using your hands.
8. Work in the softened shortening.
9. Knead gently in a bowl or on a floured board until smooth.
10. Shape into rounds and place in a greased bowl. Cover and let rise at 80-85F until doubled, about 2 hours.
11. Remove dough from the bowl and shape lightly on a floured board. Cover and let rest for 15 minutes.
12. Shape into desired forms (e.g., roll out and wrap fillings in dough).
13. Let the kolache rise slightly, not quite doubling, about 30-40 minutes.
14. Brush tops with beaten egg yolk mixed with half cold water.
15. Bake at 400F for 20-25 minutes.
